basic_details.job_title: ICDS (TP) Car Nicobar Data Entry Operator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Integrated Child Development Services (Tribal Project), Car Nicobar
basic_details.short_information: Integrated Child Development Services (Tribal Project), Car Nicobar (ICDS TP Car Nicobar) has published the Data Entry Operator Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Data Entry Operator position. Candidates within the age range of 18 to 38 years and holding a Graduation degree in any discipline along with a One Year Diploma in Computer Application are eligible to apply for these vacancies. The application process is currently open and candidates can submit their applications through offline mode on or before 25-06-2026. Candidates can easily access the notification PDF and ap

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 38 years

qualification.education_qualification: Graduation in any discipline, One Year Diploma in Computer Application
qualification.details: Data Entry Operator: Graduation in any discipline, One Year Diploma in Computer Application. Should qualify the typing speed test which will be conducted by the Dept.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ICDS (TP) Car Nicobar Data Entry Operator Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website:https://andamannicobar.gov.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 25-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ICDS (TP) Car Nicobar Data Entry Operator recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Data Entry Operator post is 25th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Data Entry Operator position?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Graduation in any discipline and a One Year Diploma in Computer Application. A typing speed test will also be conducted.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Data Entry Operator post?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Data Entry Operator position is between 18 years and 38 years. Specific age relaxations may apply as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Data Entry Operator role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Data Entry Operator post will receive a fixed salary of Rs. 15,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. You need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies for the Data Entry Operator post?
faq.answer: There is only one vacancy for the Data Entry Operator post announced by ICDS (TP) Car Nicobar.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Data Entry Operator position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Data Entry Operator post will be based on an Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and download the application form from the official website of Andaman and Nicobar Administration, which is https://andaman-nicobar.gov.in.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this Data Entry Operator position?
faq.answer: The Data Entry Operator position is a contractual job. The selected candidate will be appointed on a contract basis.
